name: Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 packages 10 oz size, frozen broccoli spears
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli in salted water until barely tender.
2. Drain and place in a baking dish.
3. Sprinkle with almonds.
4. In a saucepan, slice the garlic cheese and combine with the soups.
5. Heat through until the cheese is melted and pour over the broccoli.
6. Bake at 375 degrees until bubbly.
7. Before serving, top with bread crumbs (cubed bread or finely ground in a food processor or blender) tossed in melted butter in a skillet).
8. Return to oven until crumbs are browned.
